Everything you need for commercial door hardware and access control systems

Access Control Systems

Card readers, control panels, software integration. Professional installation and training for hotels, colleges, and commercial buildings.

Commercial Door Hardware

Exit devices, locksets, door closers from top manufacturers. Direct vendor pricing with expert installation.

Service & Maintenance

Ongoing support, emergency repairs, system updates. We installed it - we'll keep it running.

FEATURED PRODUCTS

Direct access to premium door hardware

Cylindrical Lock

Accentra 4708LN

Classroom function cylindrical lock, keyed random in PARA or 2803 keyway

Access Control

Centrios CEB100 AU

Grade 1 cylindrical lock with Bluetooth mobile access and 9V backup

Door Closer

SARGENT EN 1431 UH TB

Surface door closer with hold open arm and thru bolts

Health Care Solutions

SARGENT 8265 ALP 32D

Mortise lock with push/pull trim for healthcare environments

Why Choose Monterey Bay Door?

Professional-grade solutions with local service. Get the reliability of national suppliers with the personal attention and competitive pricing you deserve.

Direct Vendor Relationships

Competitive pricing without the middleman markup

We source directly from Allegion and major manufacturers. Better pricing, faster delivery, direct technical support.

Full-Service Approach

From specification to service contracts

We don't just supply hardware - we design, install, train, and maintain your systems. One partner, complete solution.

Enterprise Experience

Trusted by major commercial projects

Hotels, colleges, commercial buildings. We understand complex access control requirements and deliver on time, on budget.

The Leader in Major Commercial Projects

From luxury hotels to college campuses, we secure what matters most
